data.name: Obscurite Magie 3: The Divine Stones
data.detailed_description:
The story begins in Alzario, a proud nation with a long and rich history, which finds itself under attack by an evil group of heretical fanatics that call themselves Regalus, who have wreaked havoc across the land targeting the spirit stones of the world. Cialis, a member of the Royal Knights of Alzario, finds herself caught up in one of these attacks while patrolling near Alzario's spirit stone. Backed into a corner and on the verge of defeat, she hears the voice of the spirit Myuei from the stone, and the two form a pact to overcome the Regalus attack. Though they managed to stave off defeat, they soon learn of the series of tragedies befalling the neighboring nations, and of Regalus' mysterious plot to target the spirit stones. It is up to Cialis and the Royal Knights of Alzario to stop Regalus from seeing their plan come to fruition and spreading evil throughout the lands.

Return to the Obscurite Magie series with this latest entry! Explore Alzario in classic turn-based RPG battles and engage with an enthralling plot to protect the spirit stones and protect the world from the evil of Regalus.

Extra Events And Plotlines

Unlock additional scenes and side stories through exploration and meeting particular parameter requirements. There are also more scenes and stories that can only be unlocked after clearing the game, rewarding additional playthroughs!

data.short_description: Cialis of the Royal Knights of Alzario is ambushed by an evil group of heretical fanatics that call themselves Regalus. Backed into a corner and on the verge of defeat, she has no choice but to form a pact with the spirit named Myuei to fend off the heretical fanatics.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Syun-kan Flowlighter, All Rights Reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
